text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day after school. In the library, I saw Chrono Genesis 
and a Horsegirl watching her from afar.

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text: Hmm… Chrono right now really is…
choice_data_list: Do you need something from Chrono?

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text: You're Chrono's… Yes, I came to return her notebook for the test. It was so neatly organized and really helped me out, so I wanted to thank her…

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text: But right now, Chrono seems super focused… She's giving off an aura completely different from her usual graceful self…

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text: I feel like I'd be bothering her, so it's hard to call out… But I have something to do right after this… What should I do?
choice_data_list: <size=36>In that case, I can hold onto it and give it to her</size>
<size=36>In that case, I can hold onto it and give it to her</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: This time it's a 1700m dirt race, clockwise… The center of attention is number 10… It's true you can't ignore her early speed from when she pulled away for a win in her last race…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: But the one I've got my eye on is number 6… Even though she hasn't been doing well in her last few races, this time the distance is shorter, plus the track condition is—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Eep…! T-Trainer… 
W-W-When did you get here…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I-I see… So you brought this in her stead…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I feel bad for ignoring her… I was narrowing down my predictions and got completely absorbed…
choice_data_list: <size=36>By the way, which race were you predicting?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Umm… Today's individual event tournament. I've mostly formulated my predictions, so now I want to see their conditioning firsthand to improve the accuracy…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… The pre-race warm-up. 
I need to get going…!
choice_data_list: <size=40>That sounds interesting, I'll come with you</size>
<size=40>That sounds interesting, I'll come with you</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Number 6's condition… Just as predicted… 
Number 10's stride… Yeah. With this…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Yes. The favorite is number 6. The rival is number 10. Number 6 is a solid bet for 1st, and the battle for 2nd will likely be between number 10 and number 12…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eventually, the warm-up ended, and the competitors 
entered the gates one after another. However—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Pitter… patter…)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clouds rapidly covered the sky, and rain began to fall right as the race started. The spectators scrambled around, taking shelter under the roof.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
—Number 6 is leading in second place… 
She also has experience placing on a heavy track, 
so she's running calmly… Considering her past races…
choice_data_list: <size=38>Chrono, you need to get under the roof, too…!</size>
<size=38>Chrono, you need to get under the roof, too…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
No…! I'm staying right here…! 
The front row is best…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
History is filled with fierce battles fought in the rain…! 
Just thinking that this race might eventually become 
one of those battles—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I don't want to take my eyes off it…!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: History is a "picture." The countless "dots" drawn by everyone involved in racing connect, becoming lines that bring it to the surface—a massive, single picture.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She had previously mentioned being "captivated by history." This passion of hers, unbothered by the rain, proved just how captivated she truly was—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Eh, number 3 is moving here…!? 
Slipping through number 6's opening… Wah! Wah!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Number 3… snatched the win…! 
…Amazing…! Amazing, amazing!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Number 6 should have had an aptitude for heavy track conditions too…! And yet, my predictions were overturned… Hah. This development, if I remember correctly…!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I followed Chrono Genesis into the trainer's room, she was intently watching reference footage of a race.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I knew it…! The race back then also overturned my predictions…! Ah, that part just now, replay it—…!
choice_data_list: <size=38>Here, use this towel. Let's dry you off first</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Eh? Ah, Trainer… 
A towel…?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
—Aaah!? I-I'm so sorry!! 
I'm soaking wet… and… Achoo!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'm really sorry… If I got anything wet, I'll clean it up right away…
choice_data_list: <size=36>It's fine. You were just that absorbed in it, right?</size>
<size=36>It's fine. You were just that absorbed in it, right?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes…! My heart is still pounding even now… I think I'll write my next column for the school newspaper about this…
choice_data_list: <size=30>I'm looking forward to it! But don't push yourself too hard</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…………Ah.
T-Thank you…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (…Right, I… made Trainer worry again… Making them deliver my notebook, making them accompany me to a race in the rain…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Could there be… a lot of other things, too…?)
